scheme_name: Coaching Assistance for Pre-preparation for Competitive Exams of ALL INDIA level like IIM, CEPT, NIFT, NLU and IELTS, TOFEL, GRE for going Foreign
page_title: Coaching Assistance for Pre-preparation for Competitive Exams of ALL INDIA level like IIM, CEPT, NIFT, NLU and IELTS, TOFEL, GRE for going Foreign

details: The scheme "Coaching Assistance for Pre-Preparation for Competitive Exams of All India Level like IIM, CEPT, NIFT, NLU and IELTS, TOEFL, GRE for Going Foreign" was launched by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Government of Gujarat. The scheme aims to financially support SEBC and economically backward students preparing for national-level and international entrance exams. Under this scheme, eligible candidates receive up to ₹20,000/- or the actual tuition fee paid, whichever is lower, as assistance for coaching fees.
benefits: ₹20,000/- or actual coaching fee paid (whichever is lower) for pre-preparation of one competitive exam (IIM, CEPT, NIFT, NLU, IELTS, TOEFL, GRE)
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) to trainee’s bank account.
eligibility: The applicant should be a student.
The applicant must belong to the SEBC or Economically Backward Class category.
The applicant must be a permanent resident of Gujarat.
The applicant must have passed Class 10 or Class 12 (SSC or HSC).
The applicant must be preparing for one of the eligible competitive exams (IIM, CEPT, NIFT, NLU, IELTS, TOEFL, GRE).
The applicant must have paid tuition/coaching fees for the exam preparation.
The annual family income of the applicant must not exceed ₹6,00,000/-.

online: The eligible applicant may visit the e-Samaj Kalyan Portal:
On the home page, under the tab ‘Citizen Login’, click on New User ‘
Enter your Full Name as per Aadhaar Card, Gender, Date of Birth, Aadhaar Card Number, Email ID, Caste etc. and then click on ‘Register’.
After successful registration, the applicants can login through their User ID and Password.
Now, click on ‘User Profile’ to update your profile.
Fill in all the mandatory information and then click on ‘Update’.
After updating the profile successfully, select the scheme appearing on the home page; an application form will open.
Fill in all the mandatory details in the application form and upload all the relevant documents.
Now agree with the terms & conditions and click on ‘Save Application’.

Submit the application form and take out the print of the application for future reference. The applicant can note down the application number to track the application status by logging into the portal using their User ID and Password.

faqs.question: Who can apply for this scheme?
faqs.answer: Students belonging to SEBC or Economically Backward Class with a family income up to ₹6,00,000.

faqs.question: What is the financial assistance amount?
faqs.answer: Up to ₹20,000 or the actual coaching fee paid, whichever is lower.

faqs.question: Which exams are covered under this scheme?
faqs.answer: IIM, CEPT, NIFT, NLU, IELTS, TOEFL, and GRE.

faqs.question: Can this scheme be availed for multiple exams?
faqs.answer: No, the benefit is provided for coaching of only one exam per applicant.

faqs.question: Is there an educational requirement?
faqs.answer: Yes, the applicant must have passed Class 10 th or Class 12 th .

faqs.question: What is the mode of payment?
faqs.answer: The amount is transferred directly to the applicant’s bank account via DBT.

faqs.question: Is there any application fee?
faqs.answer: No, the application is free of cost.

faqs.question: How can one apply for this scheme?
faqs.answer: The applicant apply online at https://esamajkalyan.gujarat.gov.in.

faqs.question: Can students from outside Gujarat apply?
faqs.answer: No, only permanent residents of Gujarat are eligible.

faqs.question: What documents are required?
faqs.answer: Aadhaar card, caste certificate, income certificate, mark sheet, bank details, and coaching fee receipt.
